message:
🐛 Fix timeouts for large/slow clusters across entire console (#865)

Large clusters like pok-prod-sa (185 namespaces, ~30s API response) were
timing out at multiple levels, causing empty namespace dropdowns, missing
data, and degraded dashboard experience.

Changes:
- namespaces.ts: Cache-first approach + 45s timeout (was 15s)
- kubectlProxy.ts: 30-45s timeouts for all kubectl operations (was 10-20s)
- shared.ts: 45s for distribution detection namespace fetch (was 10s)
- server.go: 30-60s for agent handlers (was 15-30s)
- mcp.go: 15-30s per-cluster fan-out timeouts (was 5-10s)
- gitops.go: 15s per-cluster fan-out timeouts (was 5s)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
